name: Silvaco Group, Inc.
summary: Overview Silvaco Group, Inc. is a provider of technology computer aided design (TCAD) software, electronic data automation (EDA) software and semiconductor intellectual property (SIP). Our solutions are used by engineers to optimize semiconductor manufacturing processes and efficiently bring semiconductor products to market. Our differentiated solutions enable our customers to increase productivity, accelerate time-to-market and reduce development and manufacturing costs. 1 Table of Contents Our...
